breakdown: This PR stabilizes XP synthesis by adding fallback logic for xp_awarded in combat/encounter summaries before falling back to rewards_pending, and replaces _extract_xp_from_player_data with extract_character_xp. Good: consistent naming, type checks added, module structure maintained. Concerns: tests still reference the removed function, loss of the well-documented parsing function may reduce error handling coverage, and some docstrings were removed during refactoring.
key_changes: Remove _extract_xp_from_player_data function and replace calls with extract_character_xp
Add xp_awarded fallback logic in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box for combat rewards
Add xp_awarded fallback logic in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box for encounter rewards
Add isinstance check for combat_summary before accessing xp_awarded key
